description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named ci:images-list in the info stage. Use the mikefarah/yq:4.6.3 Docker image with an empty entrypoint. Define a variable IMAGES_LIST_FILE set to found_images.txt. In the script, iterate over all .yml files excluding any under /test/, extract image names from both the top-level image field and the image.name field using grep and yq, append them to ${IMAGES_LIST_FILE}, then sort uniquely and write to ci_images_list.txt, finally echo the list. Publish ci_images_list.txt as an artifact that expires after 2 weeks.
